items.title: Man charged with murder and sexual assault of 5-year-old Australian girl
items.raw_content: The girl's death sparked an outbreak of violence in the central Australian town from where she disappeared.
items.ai_summary: 一名男子被控谋杀和性侵一名5岁澳大利亚女孩，女孩之死引发澳洲中部小镇暴力事件。

items.title: King's speech was a 'high stakes' moment of US visit, Palace says
items.raw_content: The state visit to the US draws a positive response after what was a difficult diplomatic challenge.
items.ai_summary: 白金汉宫表示，国王对美国的国事访问演讲是一次高风险的时刻，在外交挑战中获得了积极回应。

items.title: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Trump warns of more 'cuts'
items.raw_content: In the US, two senior Republicans voice concern over President Trump's decision to pull out 5,000 troops.
items.ai_summary: 美国两位资深共和党人对特朗普撤军5000人的决定表示担忧，德国称此举可预见。

items.title: Struggling High Streets fuel sense of neglect for voters ahead of local elections
items.raw_content: Failing High Streets fuel a wider sense of political discontent which could prove crucial in the upcoming elections for English councils in May.
items.ai_summary: 商业街衰落加剧政治不满情绪，可能影响5月英格兰议会选举。

items.title: The Papers: '£7m tax bill for William' and 'Traitors take their places'
items.raw_content: The Prince of Wales's income tax bill revealed and Celebrity Traitors returns leads Sunday's papers.
items.ai_summary: 威尔士亲王所得税账单曝光，《名人叛徒》回归成为周日报纸头条。

items.title: Musk's AI told me people were coming to kill me. I grabbed a hammer and prepared for war
items.raw_content: Several people told the BBC they experienced delusions after intense conversations with AI.
items.ai_summary: 数人称与AI深度对话后出现幻觉，有人因AI警告而准备自卫。

items.title: Miami race brought forward because of storm threat
items.raw_content: Sunday's Miami Grand Prix is moved forward by three hours to 18:00 BST because of the threat of thunderstorms.
items.ai_summary: 因雷暴威胁，周日迈阿密大奖赛提前三小时至英国夏令时18:00举行。

items.title: Miami race brought forward by three hours because of storm threat
items.raw_content: Sunday's Miami Grand Prix is moved forward by three hours to 18:00 BST because of the threat of thunderstorms.
items.ai_summary: 因雷暴威胁，周日迈阿密大奖赛提前三小时至英国夏令时18:00举行。

items.title: Four injured in Brixton drive-by shooting
items.raw_content: One man is in a life-threatening condition after the attack in the early hours of Saturday.
items.ai_summary: 伦敦布里克斯顿发生驾车枪击事件，四人受伤，其中一人生命垂危。

items.title: 'I completely blew it' - Wu into final as Allen misses simple black to win
items.raw_content: Mark Allen suffers a devastating final-frame World Championship semi-final defeat by Wu Yize - after missing a simple match-winning black to win.
items.ai_summary: 马克·艾伦在世锦赛半决赛最后一局失误，错失简单黑球，吴易泽获胜晋级决赛。
